Our minimum order is 100 sets for model PL-SHED-46.
The price is USD 160 per set FOB Qingdao.
Material is PP.

We do not have an English manual.
We do not provide an installation video.
No spare parts package is available.
We have not exported this product to the United States.
Neutral branding is not available.

The packing is large, but final carton dimensions and gross weight are not available yet.
Production lead time is 60 days.
